articles.author: Jon Brodkin
articles.title: Starlink satellite breaks apart into "tens of objects"; SpaceX confirms "anomaly" - Ars Technica
articles.description: Satellite failure cause is unexplained after second "fragment creation event."

articles.title: NASA Just Found Something Strange Inside Asteroid Bennu Sample - SciTechDaily
articles.description: Scientists studying samples from the asteroid Bennu have uncovered a surprisingly complex chemical landscape at the tiniest scales.
articles.content: A view of eight sample trays containing the final material from asteroid Bennu. The dust and rocks were poured into the trays from the top plate of the Touch-and-Go Sample Acquisition Mechanism (TAGS… [+3219 chars]
